name.description: Register name as used in the CoreSight spec (may include <n> for indexed registers)

component.description: CoreSight component that contains this register

offset.description: Byte offset from the component base address (hex string)

offset_stride.description: Stride in bytes between indexed register instances (hex string)

index_variable.description: Name of the index variable for parameterized registers (e.g. 'n')

title.description: Full register title as in the CoreSight spec

brief.description: Brief description of the register's purpose

cs_arch_versions.description: CoreSight Architecture versions for which this register is defined
